articles.title: Heat stroke: Man dies near Bidar highway after collapse cases filed NH - Deccan Herald
articles.search_term: (heatstroke OR "heat stroke" OR sunstroke OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related death" OR "heat casualty" OR "heat fatality" OR "suspected heat death" OR dehydration OR "heat cramps" OR "heat illness") Karnataka
articles.full_text:
Man dies of ‘heat stroke’ near Bidar in Karnataka
He was working at a saloon in Kamalanagar. It is said he complained of giddiness, collapsed and died near the NH.
